query:
ALTER TABLE `experiences`
  ADD COLUMN `supplierId` int NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `supplierCommissionPercent` decimal(5,2) NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  ADD COLUMN `supplierCostType` enum('comision_sobre_venta','coste_fijo','porcentaje_margen','hibrido') NULL DEFAULT 'comision_sobre_venta',
  ADD COLUMN `settlementFrequency` enum('semanal','quincenal','mensual','manual') NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  ADD COLUMN `isSettlable` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false;

ALTER TABLE `packs`
  ADD COLUMN `supplierId` int NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `supplierCommissionPercent` decimal(5,2) NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  ADD COLUMN `supplierCostType` enum('comision_sobre_venta','coste_fijo','porcentaje_margen','hibrido') NULL DEFAULT 'comision_sobre_venta',
  ADD COLUMN `settlementFrequency` enum('semanal','quincenal','mensual','manual') NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  ADD COLUMN `isSettlable` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false;
